title: Jirniy's Pink HUD
description: modifies most of the hud icons (such as hearts, hunger, etc) to be more pink and cutesy :3
body:
modifies most hud icons (such as hearts, hunger, armor, etc) to be more pink! (and some effect icons to accomodate them)

### the following are changed:
- hotbar, experience and locator bars changed to a magenta-ish palette
  ![preview of hotbar + experience bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f3d906aa7b241569725f5bbfbb4396f37fc1a94.png)
- hearts (includes hardcore, absorption, effect and other type of heart textures), majority of which are pink or changed to a more pastel pallete
  ![preview of heart textures (normal + absorption + hardcore)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e67a8fe12fc3900710ff37df5dd9c134544a8d3f.png)
- air, changed to be heart-shaped
  ![preview of air/oxygen bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d77262491d81959cbfee7638ac03912ddec4c7f2.png)
- hunger bar is replaced with amethyst shard (+ compatible with [appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin))
  ![hunger bar preview (normal + hunger)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41a57d90ee4946ea527c45a136fb96349d11163d.png)
  ![appleskin preview for hunger/saturation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bec2115c94a4d68b72e214e1990ba844044f4b75.png)
- armor, changed to be pink
  ![preview of the armor bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b7f0254063086fcc6df56cf26329ebca2fb497f.png)
- effect backgrounds, effect icons to accomodate the changed hud icons: hunger, saturation, water breathing, health boost, regeneration, instant health, instant damage
  ![preview of new effect icons in the order: hunger, saturation, water breathing, health boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc5b2de304929b47af7f018809627222b31637fd.png)
  ![preview of the modified effect backgrounds (top - regular; bottom - ambient)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a837ea63b384c6cc74e23b7b9fa473caf63bc31c.png)
